form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months second last of 12 at Southwell All Weather on March 10 over 1600m, 10 len behind Camino Del Ray carrying 61kg at $17. form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation when last of 9 at Hamilton Park September 29 over 1700m, soft track; 18 len behind Arkenstaar with 59.5kg at $7.50. When resuming last campaign second last of 12 at Chester June 13 over 1200m, 8 len behind Arabian Cobra carrying 59kg at $23. Can run a bold race.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened quickly inside the final 2 furlongs.
